title: MCP Trust Registry — Publisher Recall List
description: Schema for a publisher-side recall list per protocol v0.1 §10.1. Stored at publishers/<key_id>/revocations.json in the registry tree. Each recall entry is individually signed.

recalls.description: List of recalled manifests. Append-only; entries SHOULD NOT be removed once published.

reason.description: Human-readable reason. Free text. SHOULD reference a CVE or security advisory if applicable.

severity.description: Optional severity classification. Verifiers MAY use this to gate the recall response.

supersedes_with.description: Optional: hash of a fixed manifest that supersedes this one. Lets verifiers offer an automatic upgrade path.

signature.description: ed25519 signature over the canonical form of this entry with the 'signature' field removed. Signed by publisher_key_id of the enclosing document.
